case_title: WILLKE CAROLYN A et al VS BENJAMIN JERRY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $307.90 FILED BY WILLKE CAROLYN A MONTGOMERY CYNTHIA A AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN JERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BENJAMIN JERRY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLKE CAROLYN A MONTGOMERY CYNTHIA A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENJAMIN JERRY $307.90 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN JERRY
